hero_section.layout: Relative container with responsive height (e.g., h-[50vh] to h-[60vh]). Image with bg-[#1A365D]/60 overlay for a corporate tech feel.
hero_section.content: Left-aligned text. H1 'Energia & Climatização' (Energy & Climatization). Subtitle highlighting Photovoltaic, Heat Pumps, Boilers, AC, and Accessories.
hero_section.action: Primary CTA button (bg-[#D92525]) to scroll down or navigate to categories.

gavetoes_grid.layout: Grid cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6. Displays the 5 main categories (gavetões).
gavetoes_grid.card_style: Surface white, 1px border slate-200, rounded-lg, overflow-hidden. Top image (aspect-video), padded bottom section with bold text and right arrow icon. Hover lift effect (-translate-y-1).

gavetao_details.layout: Header with category title, back button, and category icon. Grid of 'gavetinhas' (sub-items).
gavetao_details.item_style: Minimalist square card. Image top (aspect-square), small bold text below. Clean industrial aesthetic.

gavetinha_product.layout: Web: Two columns (Media left, Info right). Mobile: Stacked view.
gavetinha_product.gallery: Main image frame with a horizontal scrollable strip of thumbnails below.
gavetinha_product.video_section: 16:9 aspect ratio container for video embed (YouTube/Vimeo).
gavetinha_product.text_content: Technical specifications, description text, and list of features. Clean spacing.

admin_area.layout: Accessible without authentication (open admin as requested). Simple list of gavetinhas with 'Edit' buttons.
admin_area.form: Vertical modal or full screen. Inputs: Title, Text area for Description, Image upload button (converts to base64 for storage), Video URL input.
admin_area.buttons: Primary red button to 'Save Changes', outline button for 'Cancel'.

components_strategy.navigation: Sticky top header. Brand logo on the left, Admin mode toggle/link on the right. Solid white background with a thin bottom border.
components_strategy.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-[#D92525] text-white. Secondary buttons: border border-[#1A365D] text-[#1A365D]. Rounded-md.
components_strategy.forms: Clean labels (text-sm font-semibold text-[#1A365D]). Inputs with border-slate-300, focus:border-[#D92525] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#D92525].
components_strategy.images_handling: Since Expo Web/Mobile handles base64 easily, ensure `Image` components are configured to accept base64 format (e.g., `uri: 'data:image/jpeg;base64,...'`) or direct URLs.

technical_notes.file_extension: MUST use .js extension for all components as required. Do not use .tsx.
technical_notes.testing_attributes: All interactive and main layout elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='gavetao-card-1', data-testid='admin-edit-button').
technical_notes.responsive: Use mobile-first utility classes. Ensure touch targets are at least 44px high for mobile usability.
